item.title: Identify Your Skill Gaps Fast! 🔍 • List all skills required in your target role. • Rate your proficiency on a scale of 1-5. • Identify skills rated 3 or below. • Research quick ways to improve these gaps. • Plan 2 actions per gap to start this week. What skill gaps can you start addressing today to boost your career? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Identify Your Skill Gaps Fast! 🔍 • List all skills required in your target role. • Rate your proficiency on a scale of 1-5. • Identify skills rated 3 or below. • Research quick ways to improve these gaps. • Plan 2 actions per gap to start this week. What skill gaps can you start addressing today to boost your career? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
